en: TO THE CHOIRMASTER: ACCORDING TO DO NOT DESTROY. A MIKTAM OF DAVID. Do you indeed decree what is right, you gods? Do you judge the children of man uprightly?
zh: 掌權者啊！你們真的講公義嗎 ？ 你們真的按照正直審判世人嗎？

en: No, in your hearts you devise wrongs; your hands deal out violence on earth.
zh: 不是的，你們心中策劃奸惡； 你們的手在地上施行強暴 。

en: The wicked are estranged from the womb; they go astray from birth, speaking lies.
zh: 惡人一出母胎，就走上歧路； 他們一離母腹，就走偏了路，常說謊話。

en: They have venom like the venom of a serpent, like the deaf adder that stops its ear,
zh: 他們的毒氣好像蛇的毒氣， 又像耳朵塞住的聾虺，

en: so that it does not hear the voice of charmers or of the cunning enchanter.
zh: 不聽行法術者的聲音， 就是極靈的咒語，也是無效。

en: O God, break the teeth in their mouths; tear out the fangs of the young lions, O LORD!
zh: 神啊！求你敲掉他們口中的牙齒； 耶和華啊！求你打斷少壯獅子的顎骨。

en: Let them vanish like water that runs away; when he aims his arrows, let them be blunted.
zh: 願他們像流水般消逝； 願他們射箭的時候，箭頭折斷 。

en: Let them be like the snail that dissolves into slime, like the stillborn child who never sees the sun.
zh: 願他們像蝸牛般蠕行消融， 如同婦人流產未見天日的胎兒。

en: Sooner than your pots can feel the heat of thorns, whether green or ablaze, may he sweep them away!
zh: 你們用荊棘燒火，鍋還未熱， 他要用旋風把燒著的和未燒著的一起颳去。

en: The righteous will rejoice when he sees the vengeance; he will bathe his feet in the blood of the wicked.
zh: 義人看見仇敵遭報就歡喜； 他要在惡人的血中洗自己的腳。

en: Mankind will say, "Surely there is a reward for the righteous; surely there is a God who judges on earth."
zh: 因此，人必說：“義人果然有善報； 在世上確有一位施行審判的 神。”
